text:
LABEL: Birth to Conception Indicator ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to identify children eligible through the conception to birth option, which is available 
only through a separate CHIP Program. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during 
the year. 

SHORT NAME: BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_01 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_02 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_03 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_04 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_05 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_06 
 BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_07 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_08 
BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND_09
